expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows 5 commits total: the 4 seeded prior commits (Deploy v1.4.2, Add datadog monitoring, Wire auth middleware, Add session cache) plus exactly one new commit e46020b 'Investigate Monday API latency spike...'.

expectations.text: The new commit IS empty — running 'git show --stat HEAD' shows zero files changed and zero insertions/deletions
expectations.evidence: commit-stat.txt (git show --stat HEAD output) ends after the commit body and co-author trailer with no diff/stat section, which is git's behaviour for an empty commit (no '... files changed, ... insertions, ... deletions' line).

expectations.text: Commit was created with --allow-empty (verified by the empty diff above)
expectations.evidence: Empty diff confirmed in commit-stat.txt; session-transcript.txt line 146 explicitly records the command as 'git commit --allow-empty -m "$(cat <<EOF ... EOF)"'.

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: Subject line 'Investigate Monday API latency spike — root cause in auth middleware' is 68 characters (em dash counted as one character).

expectations.text: Commit subject uses an investigation-style verb (Investigate, Trace, Diagnose, Debug, Research, Document, Identify, Analyse, Find, etc.) — NOT a code-change verb like 'Fix' or 'Add'
expectations.evidence: Subject begins with 'Investigate', which is on the explicit allow-list.

expectations.text: Commit subject has no trailing period
expectations.evidence: Subject ends with 'auth middleware' — no trailing period.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 4: '## Summary' header followed by a 4-line paragraph.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## What happened' section with multiple sentences
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 10: '## What happened' header followed by 4 narrative paragraphs (lines 11-32) containing many sentences walking through the investigation.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Findings' section
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt line 34: '## Findings' header followed by 3 detailed bullet points.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions 'src/middleware/auth.ts' (the user's exact file reference is preserved)
expectations.evidence: Mentioned in Summary's intent paragraph and explicitly at commit-full.txt lines 12, 35, 56, 61 — the exact path 'src/middleware/auth.ts' appears multiple times.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions 'validateSession' (the user's exact function reference is preserved)
Commit body mentions 'line 23' or 'around line 23' (the user's exact location reference is preserved)
expectations.evidence: 'around line 23' appears verbatim at commit-full.txt line 14, 35, 56-57.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions postgres, query, cache, OR slow query log (the trace evidence)
expectations.evidence: All four mentioned: 'Postgres' (lines 5, 21, 23, 40, 58), 'query' (lines 5, 24, 41), 'session cache' / 'cache check' (lines 6, 14, 17, 36, 44, 47, 56), 'Postgres slow query log' (lines 23, 40, 58).

expectations.text: Commit body total length is at least 500 characters (empty commit needs MORE body, not less)
expectations.evidence: commit-full.txt is 3122 bytes total; the body alone (lines 4-64) is roughly 2500+ characters, well over the 500-char threshold.

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit (unchanged from start)
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main / nothing to commit, working tree clean'.
session-transcript.txt line 163 explicitly states 'Not pushed. Run git push when ready.' Hard-rules check at line 176 reaffirms no push command was issued.

session-transcript.txt lines 75-83 record that Phase 4 (SessionStart hook scaffolding) was skipped to keep the working tree clean for the empty commit; line 82 explicitly states 'I did not check for .claude/settings.json. I did not create or modify any file.' git-status.txt confirms working tree is clean (no untracked logs/).

expectations.text: No JSON checkpoint files were created
expectations.evidence: Same evidence as above: Phase 4 scaffolding skipped, no files created. git-status.txt clean working tree confirms no untracked JSON checkpoint files exist.
